_comment: Evidence bundle build config for Plane 3: KSI → Evidence.
_comment_collector_id: Identifier embedded in each EvidenceRecord provenance block.
_comment_version: Builder version stamped into every provenance envelope.
_comment_hashing: Algorithm used for per-record SHA-256 sidecar files and the bundle hash.
_comment_provenance_policy: 'embed' (default): provenance metadata is embedded in each EvidenceRecord
AND written to a separate file in provenance/.
'sidecar-only':    provenance is written only to the provenance/ directory
_comment_retention: Number of days to retain evidence bundle directories before rotation.
Currently advisory only — no automated pruning is performed by the builder.
Downstream archival tooling should respect this value.
_comment_fresh_verdicts: KSI verdicts that are considered 'fresh' evidence (evidence.fresh = true).
Default: pass and fail (inconclusive and excluded are considered stale).
